challenges.title: Second Round Steals
challenges.description: Draft only players selected in the 2nd round of the NBA Draft.

challenges.title: Pacific Pipeline
challenges.description: Every pick must come from the Pacific Division.

challenges.title: Southwest Sweep
challenges.description: Every pick must come from the Southwest Division.

challenges.title: Veteran Village
challenges.description: Only players age 30 or older are eligible.

challenges.title: Young Guns
challenges.description: Only players age 24 or younger are eligible.

challenges.title: Splash Zone
challenges.description: Only players shooting 38% or better from three.

challenges.title: Midrange University
challenges.description: Only players shooting below 34% from three.
